creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: gavin
Date: Sun Jan 17 11:21:18 2010
New Revision: 202467
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/base/202467

Log:
  Merge r197308 from head (originally by ed):
  
    Spell Israel correctly.
  
  PR:		bin/138580
  Submitted by:	Alexey Savartsov <asavartsov gmail com>
  Approved by:	ed (mentor, implicit)

Modified:
  stable/7/usr.sbin/sysinstall/menus.c
Directory Properties:
  stable/7/usr.sbin/sysinstall/   (props changed)

Modified: stable/7/usr.sbin/sysinstall/menus.c
==============================================================================
--- stable/7/usr.sbin/sysinstall/menus.c	Sun Jan 17 11:20:53 2010	(r202466)
+++ stable/7/usr.sbin/sysinstall/menus.c	Sun Jan 17 11:21:18 2010	(r202467)
@@ -638,7 +638,7 @@ DMenu MenuMediaFTP = {
       { " Ireland #3",	"ftp3.ie.freebsd.org", NULL, dmenuSetVariable, NULL,
 	VAR_FTP_PATH "=ftp://ftp3.ie.freebsd.org" },
 
-      { "Isreal",	"ftp.il.freebsd.org", NULL, dmenuSetVariable, NULL,
+      { "Israel",	"ftp.il.freebsd.org", NULL, dmenuSetVariable, NULL,
 	VAR_FTP_PATH "=ftp://ftp.il.freebsd.org" },
 
       { "Italy",	"ftp.it.freebsd.org", NULL, dmenuSetVariable, NULL,
